reconstruction_confidence_reason: LLaMA 3.1 is open-weight. Meta publishes the official chat template and default system prompt in the model card and GitHub repository. This is the actual recommended template, not a reconstruction.

sources.title: Meta Responsible Use Guide for LLaMA
LLaMA Guard: LLM-based Input-Output Safeguard for Human-AI Conversations

notes: LLaMA 3.1 is unique in this library as a fully open-weight model where the default system prompt is published by Meta directly. The open nature means safety behaviors are more configurable than any closed model, and community fine-tunes with altered safety profiles exist. Meta recommends using LLaMA Guard as an independent safety layer rather than relying exclusively on model-internal safety behaviors.
